title: alpinia mesanthera
intro: Alpinia mesanthera, also known as Lesser Galangal, is a type of plant species in the Ginger family (Zingiberaceae). It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Alpinia mesanthera include reducing nausea and vomiting, alleviating pain, and preventing the growth of bacteria and fungi. Alpinia mesanthera can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional remedies for its medicinal and culinary uses.
